testcase.name: test_transactions_csv

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase7f.py:109: in test_transactions_csv assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_second_doc_awards_bonus
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase7f.py:175: in test_second_doc_awards_bonus assert bal_after - bal_before >= 100, f"before={bal_before} after={bal_after}" E AssertionError: before=0 after=0 E assert (0 - 0) >= 100
